summary: Kang Hyunwoo meets General Ferard at Latus Fortress and accepts a quest to investigate the cause of a monster wave in the Ragged Mountains. After hours of grinding and failing to find item drops, Hyunwoo persists in his mission to secure a new weapon. Finally, the story shifts to the filming of a 'Masked Combat' show, where Hyunwoo prepares to participate as a contestant alongside other fighters, including Jung Hanbaek.
key_moments: Kang Hyunwoo receives the Ragged Mountains clean-up quest from General Ferard.
Hyunwoo spends twelve hours grinding 999 monsters but fails to receive any item drops.
Hyunwoo arrives at the set for the King Masked Combat show to compete for the title.
